BLD.Settings.PromptOnManual.Name: Prompt on manual bleed
BLD.Settings.PromptOnManual.Hint: When the bleed condition is applied by hand with no bleed configured, ask for an amount and type. Bleed applied via @Bleed or the API is unaffected.
BLD.Prompt.MarkerNote: Choose Marker Only to leave the bleed condition inert (no automatic damage).
BLD.Prompt.Title: Apply Bleed — {name}
BLD.Enricher.NoTarget: Bleed: no target. Select or target a token first.
BLD.Display.Heading: Bleed
BLD.Display.HighestNote: Highest of each type applies each round.
BLD.Burning.Ignite: {name} catches fire and takes {total} fire damage.
BLD.Burning.Extinguish: {name} makes the save and puts out the flames.
BLD.Burning.Burn: {name} fails to douse the flames and takes {total} fire damage.
BLD.Burning.AutoDamage: {name} takes {total} fire damage from the flames.
BLD.Burning.AutoNoSave: {name} takes {total} fire damage from the flames (no save attempted).
BLD.Burning.SaveFlavor: {name} is on fire — Reflex DC {dc} to put it out.
BLD.Burning.Card.SaveButton: Reflex Save (DC {dc}) to put out the flames
BLD.Burning.Enricher.Tooltip: Set on fire (1d6 fire/round, Reflex DC {dc} to put out)
BLD.Burning.Enricher.NoTarget: Burning: no target. Select or target a token first.
BLD.Settings.SavePrompt.Name: Reflex save vs. burning
BLD.Settings.SavePrompt.Hint: When on, a burning creature may attempt a Reflex save at the start of its turn to put out the flames. When off, no save is prompted — a burning creature automatically takes 1d6 fire damage at the end of each of its turns until the burning condition is removed.
